title: ICSI Recruitment 2026: Various Posts Announced (Advt. No. 02/2026)
content:
# ICSI Recruitment 2026: Various Posts Announced (Advt. No. 02/2026)

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne various posts ke liye recruitment notification (Advt. No. 02/2026) announce kiya hai. Interested aur eligible candidates ab online apply kar sakte hain.

**Here are the key details:**

*   **Advertisement Number:** Advt. No. 02/2026
*   **Posts Available:** This recruitment drive includes positions such as Joint Director, Deputy Director, Assistant Director, Assistant Engineer, Executive (Internal Audit), and Executive (Academics) at ICSI Headquarters and other offices.
*   **Application Start Date:** Online application process has commenced from March 21, 2026.
*   **Last Date to Apply:** The deadline for submitting online applications is April 12, 2026.
*   **Eligibility Cut-off Date:** For all purposes, including age, qualifications, and experience, the cut-off date is March 1, 2026.

Candidates are advised to review the official advertisement thoroughly for detailed eligibility criteria, selection process, and other important instructions.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/careers/)

*Published on: 22 March 2026*
